title: Ceasefire in the Static (Data Storm Version)

identity.vocalStyle: emotional female rock-opera singing paired with a vulnerable male R&B lead
identity.styleSentence: At a slow 82 BPM, this track blends dark gothic orchestration with late-90s street drums and deep piano to create an emotional R&B soundscape punctuated by digital glitch textures and urgent spoken-word verses.
identity.summary: A darkly atmospheric Gothic R&B track that explores the psychological weight of digital overload and information anxiety.

keywords.imageryPrompt: grainy black and white television snow filling a dimly lit bedroom, digital noise overlaying shadows of furniture
a single beam of soft moonlight piercing through heavy storm clouds to illuminate a quiet patch of floor in a chaotic room
shattered glass reflecting distorted faces on the ceiling, sharp red light pulses cutting through darkness like warning signs
a person standing in a room where every object is vibrating with invisible waves of blue and green digital data streams
translucent silhouettes of former friends or strangers flickering on the back of a smartphone screen within a dark living room
fragments of glowing binary numbers and broken geometric lines floating in an empty void, slowly assembling into a human shape
